STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(100, 60, 8)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(3).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=8).rect(90, 50).extrude(4)
